creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
I've updated to the latest ohphone, but still see the same problem - 
even if I don't try to connect to localhost, but to another machine:

[larse@hbo: ~] /usr/local/bin/ohphone -tttttttt -n amc.isi.edu
OhPhone Version 1.1.4 by Open H323 Project on Unix FreeBSD 
(4.2-RELEASE-i386)

  Created endpoint.

GSM frame size: 4

  UserInput/dtmf <8>
